title: Daisy SMP Powers
description: Powers for origins in Daisy SMP
body:
Daisy SMP Powers

Adds various tweaks for the Daisy SMP!

This mods could be called a library mod that just adds powers to be used in datapacks, this is mainly made for to be used in Daisy SMP. This also adds a 30 minute (configurable) origin trial --- ## Features - **List of powers**: `better_fishing_rod, careful_gatherer, friend_with_the_bees, item_collector, longer_potions, more_crop_drops`. --- ## Support If you encounter any issues or have suggestions, feel free to: - Open an issue on GitHub. - Send me a DM on Discord @macuguita - You are free to use this mod in any Modpack in this platform --- ## Credits - Developer: macuguita
